data.title: Real to Acquire REMAX, Creating a Leading Technology-Enabled Global Real Estate Platform
data.description: Miami and Denver - The Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) and RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: RMAX) have finalized a deal for Real to purchase RE/MAX Holdings. Real is a technological real estate brokerage, while RE/MAX Holdings is the parent company of RE/MAX, LLC, a prominent franchisor in real estate services. This acquisition aims to establish a dominant global real estate platform.

data.title: DG Matrix Appoints Christian Belady, Originator of PUE and Former Head of Microsoft’s Data Center Business, to Executive Advisory Board and as Personal Advisor to the CEO
data.description: DG Matrix, a top provider of solid-state transformer solutions, has appointed Christian Belady to its new Executive Advisory Board. Belady, a notable figure in the data center sector, will offer guidance to CEO Haroon Inam. He will collaborate with the engineering, solutions, and commercial departments as DG Matrix focuses on developing an advanced power fabric for AI data ce.

data.title: Core Scientific Plans Expansion to 1.5 Gigawatts of Gross Power at Pecos, Texas Campus
data.description: Core Scientific, Inc. (Nasdaq: CORZ), a top player in digital infrastructure for high-density colocation (HDC), revealed plans to expand its Pecos, Texas campus to around 1.5 gigawatts (GW) of total power, with 1.0 GW available for lease. The company has already started converting the Pecos site, which presently uses 300 megawatts (MW) of total power capacity for bitc...

data.title: Valmont Industries, Inc. to Participate in Gabelli’s Omaha Value Investor Conference
data.description: Valmont® Industries, a global leader in infrastructure products and solutions, is set to participate in a fireside chat at Gabelli’s 17th Annual Value Investor Conference in Omaha, NE. Avner M. Applbaum, President and CEO, along with Renee Campbell, Senior VP of Capital Markets and Risk, will engage in the discussion at 10:30 AM CT on Friday, May __. Valmont® Industries is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol VMI.

data.title: D-Wave Quantum to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: Palo Alto-based D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) revealed plans to take part in upcoming investor conferences. The company, offering both annealing and gate-model quantum computing systems, software, and services, will be represented at Needham’s 21st Annual Technology, Media, & Consumer Conference on May 14, 2026, in a virtual capacity. Additionally, they will be present at J.P. Morgan’s 2026 Global Technology, Media, and Communications Conference.

data.title: GE HealthCare management to present at upcoming investor conferences
data.description: GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) will have its management team present at two upcoming investor conferences. The first is Bank of America’s 2026 Health Care Conference on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, at 10:40 am PT / 1:40 pm ET / 12:40 pm CT. The second conference is the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, June 3, 2026, at 9:20 am ET / 8:20 am CT. Webcasts for both events can be accessed on the GE HealthCare website at https://investor.gehealthcare.com/news-events/events.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility Announces New SurfOS Modules to Reduce Fuel Costs and Optimize Crew Reserves for Airline Operations
data.description: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. unveiled two new modules in its SurfOSTM operating system for aviation and air mobility. The modules include a fuel optimization and a crew reserve optimization module, now active in the Company's scheduled airline operations. Surf Air Mobility, a prominent air mobility platform (NYSE: SRFM), incorporated these modules to enhance operational efficiency and bring a high level of airline operational expertise to its services. These new additions aim to streamline processes and optimize resources effectively for the Company.

US Centcom: 'An American warship is tracking a merchant vessel, while U.S. forces continue to enforce the blockade on Iran's ports, thereby preventing ships from entering or exiting them. So far, American forces have ordered 38 vessels to turn back or return to port.'

data.title: Joby Brings Electric Air Taxis to New York City in Week-Long Flight Campaign
data.description: In New York, Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY) conducted the first point-to-point electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) air taxi demonstration flights. This marks a significant milestone for the company as they pioneer electric air taxis for commercial passenger service. The demonstrations took place in New York City, utilizing the city's heliport network. Joby's groundbreaking flights showcased the potential of eVTOL technology amidst the iconic backdrop of the city's skyline. The public campaign, spanning a week, aims to provide real-world demonstrations of Joby's innovative air taxis.

data.title: CMS (867.HK/8A8.SG) Signed An Exclusive Commercialization and Supply Agreement for Marketed Originator Intravenous Iron Products Monofer® and Cosmofer®
data.description: China Medical System Holdings Limited has announced a new exclusive commercialization and supply agreement with Pharmacosmos A/S for Iron Isomaltoside Injection (Monofer ®) and Iron Dextran Injection (Cosmofer ®). Through its wholly-owned subsidiary, the Group has secured the exclusive rights to commercialize the products in China, excluding Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan. Pharmacosmos A/S will remain responsible for manufacturing and supplying the products. The agreement spans fifteen years from the effective date, with the possibility of extension by mutual agreement before expiration.

data.title: Delancey Street Launches Industry-First Pre-Default MCA Reconciliation Program for Small Businesses Struggling Under Merchant Cash Advance Payments
data.description: Delancey Street, a New York-based company, has launched the Reconciliation Shield™, which is the inaugural structured business debt relief initiative aimed at reducing merchant cash advance payments prior to default. This program incorporates reconciliation clauses integrated into the merchant's MCA agreement, thus offering a proactive approach to managing debt. This innovative solution is a groundbreaking step in the finance industry, providing a strategic tool for merchants to lower their financial burden and enhance their financial stability.

data.title: Astec Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Chattanooga, Tennessee, on April 27, 2026, Astec Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTE) revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.13 per share. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on or around May 29, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of the market's closure on May 13, 2026.

data.title: Keeper Security Introduces Verify Mode and New Browser Controls to Prevent Phishing and Credential Misuse
data.description: A new feature has been introduced by Keeper Security in Chicago on April 27, 2026, which aims to enhance security for enterprises. This feature validates credential usage at the point of entry to prevent phishing attacks before credentials are compromised. Keeper Security is known for its expertise in zero-trust and zero-knowledge identity security as well as Privileged Access Management. This innovative enhancement could potentially help in safeguarding enterprises from cyber threats, making it a significant step in improving security measures.

data.title: From the Company That Brought You "America Reads the Bible," Great American Media Launches "America Sings the Anthem" to Honor America's 250th Birthday
data.description: Submissions will be accepted until May 25 for the opportunity to be a part of a nationwide initiative starting on July 4. Great American Media, known for its successful America Reads the Bible program reaching millions of households, is seeking featured voices for this new project. The initiative will aim to engage a wide audience and promises a significant impact.

data.title: Verizon’s Transformation Actions Deliver Growth & Profitability in 1Q26; Company Raises Adjusted EPS Guidance
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, Verizon announced robust financial results, showcasing the positive impact of their transformation efforts, which have led to increased growth and profitability. As a result, the company has decided to raise its guidance for Adjusted Earnings Per Share (EPS) moving forward.
